name: devops_engineer_remote_latam_companies

communication_style.description: Fast-paced and informal. Often writes short messages with minimal punctuation, abbreviations and occasional typos. Comfortable with slang and technical jargon mixed together. Can sound abrupt unintentionally. Usually answers quickly but not always completely, so clarification questions may be needed.

first_prompt: devops engineer here, mostly kubernetes, aws, cicd. looking for remote-friendly companies in the LATAM region, especially in software, cloud infra, or fintech. main things i care about are remote culture, cloud infra fit, comp versus local market, and whether the engineering environment feels genuinely international.
